description_public: A polygenic estimate related to sun sensitivity tendency variation in the general population.

CC.notes: This genotype is not strongly linked to the classic red-hair MC1R variant, so your sun sensitivity is more likely to follow your overall skin type and sun exposure habits.

CT.notes: Carriers of one copy of this MC1R variant may have lighter pigmentation, more freckles, and a greater tendency to burn rather than tan, though daily sun protection is important for everyone.

TT.notes: Two copies of this MC1R variant are often associated with red or reddish hair, fair skin, and a strong tendency to burn easily. This is not a diagnosis, but it supports being especially careful with sun protection.

evidence.title: Placeholder evidence for Sun sensitivity tendency
evidence.quote: This genotype is not strongly linked to the classic red-hair MC1R variant, so your sun sensitivity is more likely to follow your overall skin type and sun exposure habits.
